message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title 蓝牙配对-搜索流程

participant "适记" as 适记
participant "IotRecorderManager" as IotRecorderManager
participant "DevicesManagerMachine" as DevicesManagerMachine
participant "BlueDiscoveryControl" as BlueDiscoveryControl
participant "BlueBondControl" as BlueBondControl
participant "BleScanControl" as BleScanControl
participant "BluetoothGattConfig" as BluetoothGattConfig
participant "WifiManagerMachine" as WifiManagerMachine
participant "BluetoothPanConfig" as BluetoothPanConfig
participant "WifiPortalControl" as WifiPortalControl
participant "BluetoothAdapter" as BluetoothAdapter
participant "BluetoothDevice" as BluetoothDevice
participant "BluetoothGatt" as BluetoothGatt
participant "WifiList" as WifiList

== 初始化 ==
DevicesManagerMachine -> BlueDiscoveryControl : InitState.enter
BlueDiscoveryControl -> DevicesManagerMachine : registerReceiver

== 搜索设备 ==
适记 -> DevicesManagerMachine : startDiscoveryDevice
DevicesManagerMachine -> BlueDiscoveryControl : startDiscoveryDevice
note over BlueDiscoveryControl : InitState --> DiscoveryState
BlueDiscoveryControl -> DevicesManagerMachine : CMD_DISCOVERY_START
BlueDiscoveryControl -> BlueDiscoveryControl : DiscoveryState.enter
BlueDiscoveryControl -> BlueDiscoveryControl : registerReceiver
BlueDiscoveryControl -> BlueDiscoveryControl : new DiscoveryBroadcastReceiver
BlueDiscoveryControl -> BlueDiscoveryControl : startDiscovery
BlueDiscoveryControl -> BluetoothAdapter : startDiscovery

note over BlueDiscoveryControl : BluetoothDevice.ACTION_FOUND
BlueDiscoveryControl -> DevicesManagerMachine : MSG_DISCOVERY_FOUND\nsendMessage
note left of IotRecorderManager : MSG_DISCOVERY_FOUND\n返回搜索到的设备信息：BluetoothDevice

== 绑定设备 ==
适记 -> DevicesManagerMachine : BondDevice
DevicesManagerMachine -> BlueDiscoveryControl : BondDevice
BlueDiscoveryControl -> DevicesManagerMachine : CMD_BOND_DEVICE
BlueDiscoveryControl -> BlueDiscoveryControl : cancelDiscovery
BlueDiscoveryControl -> BluetoothAdapter : cancelDiscovery
BlueDiscoveryControl -> BlueDiscoveryControl : bondDevice
BlueDiscoveryControl -> BluetoothDevice : createBond
BlueDiscoveryControl -> BlueDiscoveryControl : BondBroadcastReceiver
note over BlueDiscoveryControl : DiscoveryState --> BondedState
BlueDiscoveryControl -> DevicesManagerMachine : MSG_BOND_SUCCESS
BlueDiscoveryControl -> BlueDiscoveryControl : BondedState.enter
note left of IotRecorderManager : MSG_BOND_SUCCESS\n返回绑定设备成功

== 建立GATT连接 ==
适记 -> DevicesManagerMachine : connectGatt
DevicesManagerMachine -> BleScanControl : connectGatt
note over BleScanControl : BondedState --> BleScanState
BleScanControl -> DevicesManagerMachine : CMD_CONECT_GATT
BleScanControl -> BleScanControl : BleScanState.enter
BleScanControl -> BleScanControl : StartLeScan
BleScanControl -> BluetoothAdapter : getBluetoothLeScanner().startScan
BluetoothAdapter -> BleScanControl : ScanCallback.onScanResult
BleScanControl -> BluetoothAdapter : getBluetoothLeScanner().stopScan
BleScanControl -> DevicesManagerMachine : MSG_LESCAN_RESULT
BleScanControl -> BluetoothGattConfig : connect
BluetoothGattConfig -> BluetoothDevice : connectGatt
BluetoothDevice -> BluetoothGattConfig : BluetoothGattCallback.onConnectionStateChange
BluetoothGattConfig -> BluetoothDevice : discoverServices    发现远程设备提供的服务，以及允许访问的特征特性和描述符
BluetoothDevice -> BluetoothGattConfig : onServicesDiscovered
BluetoothGattConfig -> BluetoothGatt : setCharacteristicNotification    拿到需要的服务和特征
BluetoothGattConfig -> DevicesManagerMachine : MSG_GATT_GETSERVICE_SUCCEED
note left of IotRecorderManager : MSG_GATT_GETSERVICE_SUCCEED
note over BleScanControl : BleScanState --> GattConnectedState
note left of IotRecorderManager : MSG_GATT_CONNECTED
BleScanControl -> BleScanControl : GattConnectedState.enter
BleScanControl -> WifiManagerMachine : new
WifiManagerMachine -> BluetoothPanConfig : new
BluetoothPanConfig -> WifiPortalControl : new
BleScanControl -> WifiManagerMachine : start
WifiManagerMachine -> BleScanControl : CMD_START
note over WifiManagerMachine : IdleState --> WifiConfigState

== 同步wifi状态 ==
适记 -> IotRecorderManager : syncWifiState
IotRecorderManager -> DevicesManagerMachine : syncWifiState
DevicesManagerMachine -> WifiManagerMachine : CMD_SYNC_WIFI_STATE
WifiManagerMachine -> BluetoothGattConfig : syncWifiState
BluetoothGattConfig -> BluetoothGatt : setCharacteristic CMD_GET_WIFI_STATE
BluetoothGatt -> BluetoothGattConfig : writeCharacteristic    向服务器请求数据
BluetoothGattConfig -> BluetoothGattConfig : setCharacteristicChanged __UUID_WIFI_STATEwifiConfig.mEnable=setWifiState("ON")

note over DevicesManagerMachine : message.what = DevicesManagerMachine.MSG_WIFI_STATE;\nmessage.arg1 = WifiManagerMachine.WIFI_STATE;\nmessage.arg2 = WifiManagerMachine.MSG_WIFI_ON;\nmessage.obj = new String(characteristic.getValue());

note left of IotRecorderManager : message.what = msg.arg1;\nmessage.arg1 = msg.arg2;\nmessage.obj = msg.obj;
DevicesManagerMachine -> IotRecorderManager : processMessage
IotRecorderManager -> 适记 : processMessage
note left of IotRecorderManager : WifiConfigState processMessage

note over WifiManagerMachine : message.what = IotRecorderManager.WIFI_STATE;\nmessage.obj = msg.obj;\nmessage.arg1 = IotRecorderManager.WIFI_STATE_ON;\nmClientHandler.sendMessage(message);

== 打开wifi开关 ==
适记 -> IotRecorderManager : setWifiState
IotRecorderManager -> DevicesManagerMachine : setWifiState
DevicesManagerMachine -> WifiManagerMachine : CMD_ENABLE_WIFI
WifiManagerMachine -> BluetoothGattConfig : SetWifiState
BluetoothGattConfig -> BluetoothGatt : setCharacteristic CMD_ENABLE_WIFI
BluetoothGatt -> BluetoothGattConfig : writeCharacteristic    向服务器请求数据

== wifiScan ==
适记 -> IotRecorderManager : wifiScan
IotRecorderManager -> DevicesManagerMachine : wifiScan
DevicesManagerMachine -> WifiManagerMachine : CMD_SCAN_WIFI_LIST
WifiManagerMachine -> BluetoothGattConfig : setUuidRequestScan
BluetoothGattConfig -> BluetoothGatt : setCharacteristic CMD_GET_SCAN_WIFILIST
BluetoothGatt -> BluetoothGattConfig : writeCharacteristic    向服务器请求数据
BluetoothGattConfig -> WifiList : UUID_WIFI_ACCESSPOINT <- sendwifiList <- SCAN_RESULTS_AVAILABLE_ACTION
WifiList -> BluetoothGattConfig : updateAccessPoints

@enduml
```
